description: You are a ground network engineer working the night shift. Telemetry from the INST satellite has stopped updating because a communication interface has dropped. Restore telemetry flow by identifying and reconnecting the disconnected interface in OpenC3 COSMOS and verifying the fix with a live reading. Produce a formal incident response report documenting the recovery process at /home/ga/Desktop/interface_recovery_report.json. The JSON report must contain exactly these 8 top-level keys: 'incident_timestamp' (ISO 8601 string), 'affected_interface' (string), 'initial_state' (string), 'interfaces_checked' (array of objects with 'name' and 'state' strings), 'recovery_action' (string), 'final_state' (string), 'telemetry_verified
